_template_notes._purpose: Template consumed by distill-meta Phase 5 (step 5 in references/output-spec.md §4) to render each generated persona skill's manifest.json. MUST validate against contracts/manifest.schema.json after placeholder substitution.
_template_notes._substitution_rule: distill-meta scans for tokens of shape {ALL_CAPS_SNAKE}. String slots are quoted placeholders like "{PERSONA_SLUG}" and substituted in place. Array slots ("{COMPONENTS_ARRAY}", "{TRIGGERS_ARRAY}", "{DOMAINS_ARRAY}", "{SOURCE_CATEGORIES_ARRAY}") are replaced with the full JSON array literal. Numeric slots ("{DENSITY_SCORE_NUMBER}", etc.) are string-typed here and replaced with raw numbers at render time (quotes dropped).
_template_notes._strip_before_write: distill-meta MUST delete this "_template_notes" key before writing the rendered manifest.json to disk. The schema does not permit extra top-level keys with validation intent; keeping this block post-render would leak generator internals into consumer skills.

_placeholder_catalog.{PERSONA_DISTILL_VERSION}: SemVer of the persona-distill plugin at render time. Default "0.1.0".
_placeholder_catalog.{DISTILL_META_VERSION}: v0.2.0+. SemVer of distill-meta at the time of last write (generator or migrator). On first generation, set equal to {PERSONA_DISTILL_VERSION}. Bumped by the migrator agent at Stage 3c step 6.
_placeholder_catalog.{SCHEMA_TYPE}: One of the 9 enum values in manifest.schema.json → schema_type.
_placeholder_catalog.{SCHEMA_VERSION}: SemVer of the schema definition consumed. Default "0.1.0".
_placeholder_catalog.{COMPONENTS_ARRAY}: v0.2.0+ form preferred: JSON array of objects {slug, version, original_component_hash}. Legacy string-array form still validates but disables migrator user-edit detection. See contracts/manifest.schema.json → components_used → oneOf.
_placeholder_catalog.{PERSONA_SLUG}: kebab-case identity.name. Used as directory name and SKILL.md 'name'.
_placeholder_catalog.{PERSONA_DESCRIPTION}: One-paragraph summary. Router matches against this field.
_placeholder_catalog.{SUBJECT_TYPE}: One of: real-person | composite | fictional | rule-system | topic.
_placeholder_catalog.{TRIGGERS_ARRAY}: JSON array of trigger phrase strings. minItems=1.
_placeholder_catalog.{FINGERPRINT_HEX}: 64-char lowercase hex SHA-256 over sorted knowledge/**/*.md. Write the literal string "TO_BE_COMPUTED" BEFORE Phase 5 step 2 and overwrite with the computed digest at step 5. NOT recomputed during migration (migration only touches components/).
_placeholder_catalog.{COMPONENTS_FINGERPRINT_HEX}: v0.2.0+. 64-char lowercase hex SHA-256 over sorted concat of components/**/*.md content hashes (separated by \n). Recomputed by the migrator whenever any component is rewritten. Write "TO_BE_COMPUTED" during render, overwrite at Phase 5 step 5 (after components are finalized).
_placeholder_catalog.{VERSION}: SemVer of this persona skill. Default "0.1.0" on first render; bumped by distill-meta on subsequent writes.
_placeholder_catalog.{GENERATED_AT_ISO8601}: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of first generation (e.g. "2026-04-14T15:11:28Z"). NOT updated by the migrator — see {LAST_MIGRATED_AT_ISO8601_OR_NULL}.
_placeholder_catalog.{LAST_MIGRATED_AT_ISO8601_OR_NULL}: v0.2.0+. ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of last successful migration, or the literal null (no quotes) on first render. Updated by the migrator agent at step 6. Emit null as raw JSON, not a string.
_placeholder_catalog.{MIGRATION_HISTORY_ARRAY}: v0.2.0+. JSON array of migration-pass records per manifest.schema.json → migration_history. Emit the empty array [] on first render; the migrator appends entries.
_placeholder_catalog.{DENSITY_SCORE_NUMBER}: Most recent persona-judge density score 0-10, or -1 if not yet evaluated. Emit as raw number (no quotes) at render time.
_placeholder_catalog.{VALIDATION_SCORE_NUMBER_OR_NULL}: Most recent persona-judge validation score 0-110 raw, or -1. Emit as raw number. The migrator sets this to null (raw JSON null) at step 6 to force re-validation at step 7.
_placeholder_catalog.{UNVALIDATED_BOOL}: true on first render (pre-judge), flipped to false after persona-judge writes validation-report.md. Emit as raw boolean.
_placeholder_catalog.{PRIMARY_RATIO_NUMBER}: Fraction of corpus from primary sources, 0.0-1.0. Emit as raw number.
_placeholder_catalog.{SOURCE_CATEGORIES_ARRAY}: JSON array of source category strings (e.g. ["articles", "chats", "transcripts"]).
